### 1. MARKET OVERVIEW
The overall market is currently in a distribution phase, with most tokens showing no significant price or volume changes. Notable shifts include changes in the Fear, Greed, and Hope (FHS) scores and Net Buying Pressure (NBP) for several tokens.

### 2. PRICE & VOLUME HIGHLIGHTS
No token has shown a price change of more than 2% or a volume change of more than 20%. However, several tokens have experienced changes in their FHS and NBP.
